cit.basis: Standard 25% corporate income tax on companies (Ley de Régimen Tributario Interno — LRTI).

tax_haven_surcharge.note: +3pp (28%) when shareholders resident in tax havens / low-tax jurisdictions, or undisclosed shareholders, represent 50% or more of the ownership chain; proportional below that threshold (simplified here as a boolean).

cit.sme_regimes_note: RIMPE regime for entrepreneurs and 'negocios populares' (turnover-based progressive rates up to USD 300,000) and prior microenterprise regimes are out of scope for this SME estimator.
cit.note: Administered by the SRI (Servicio de Rentas Internas). Reinvestment-of-profits rate reductions and temporary solidarity contributions are out of scope.

wht.dividends_note: Dividends distributed to resident individuals and non-residents are generally subject to withholding on 40% of the distributed dividend; treaty and disclosure rules vary.
wht.isd_note: ISD (Impuesto a la Salida de Divisas): 5% tax on currency transfers/payments abroad (rate has fluctuated by decree; 5% per Decreto 1105 as of late 2024/2025).

raised.law: Ley Orgánica para Enfrentar el Conflicto Armado Interno (Ley de Solidaridad)

vat.note: IVA raised from 12% to 15% in April 2024 under the Ley de Solidaridad; 15% remains the standard rate for 2025. Reduced 5%/8% rates apply to specific goods/tourism periods.

labour.note: IESS social security (employer 12.15%, employee 9.45%), 15% statutory workers' profit sharing, and 13th/14th salaries apply to payroll.

official_sources.name: SRI — Servicio de Rentas Internas del Ecuador

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Proportional tax-haven surcharge below the 50% threshold, RIMPE/microenterprise regimes, reinvestment reductions, and temporary contributions may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
